commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because there are no concrete blocking findings; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review, CI, and merge gating.; Cleared: The diff is limited to agent/Codex tool metadata handling and tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, permissions, or package execution surfaces. (sha=b173b9b778fa965e0cc5f05501e3788a988340dd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR carries async-started media tool metadata through embedded and Codex app-server attempt paths to suppress generic incomplete-turn warnings while preserving replay-unsafety.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main records async media starts as ordinary tool metadata and the incomplete-turn guard has no async-start exemption, so a tool-use terminal async media turn can fall through to the generic warning. I did not execute the live provider path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because there are no concrete blocking findings; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review, CI, and merge gating.

target.title: fix: suppress async media incomplete-turn errors
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve async-started tool metadata when background media generation starts
- carry async-start metadata through Codex dynamic-tool progress, projector, snapshot, and attempt metadata paths
- suppress the generic incomplete-turn error for async media starts while still marking replay as unsafe
- count async-started tool activity as trajectory progress and deterministic side-effect state

## Upstream check
- fetched current upstream/main before patching; this behavior was not already fixed upstream

## Tests
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts -t "preserves terminal async|keeps async-start metadata|carries async-started dynamic tool metadata|marks executed dynamic-tool completion-idle"
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.media.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt-trajectory-status.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.media.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.types.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.media.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts
- git diff --check
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
- AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Session-backed async `image_generate` starts should not produce the generic incomplete-turn warning while replay remains unsafe.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout at `b173b9b778fa965e0cc5f05501e3788a988340dd`, CLI `OpenClaw 2026.5.24`, real xAI image provider path (`xai/grok-imagine-image`), session key `agent:main:pr-85933-async-proof-final`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```sh
pnpm openclaw agent --local --json --session-key agent:main:pr-85933-async-proof-final --message '/tool image_generate action=generate model=xai/grok-imagine-image prompt="small red square icon on a white background" count=1' --timeout 180
rg -n "Background task started|sessions_yield interrupt|image_generate|\"async\":true|\"status\":\"started|couldn't generate a response|This turn appears incomplete|incomplete turn" <redacted session jsonl>
if rg -q "couldn't generate a response|This turn appears incomplete|incomplete turn" <redacted session jsonl>; then print -r "generic incomplete-turn warning FOUND"; else print -r "generic incomplete-turn warning NOT found"; fi
pnpm openclaw tasks list --json
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal/session transcript excerpt:
```text
toolResult image_generate:
  Background task started for image generation (7dc385c1-ca50-433b-b1d0-b91419ac6a1e).
  details.async=true
  details.status=started
  details.taskId=7dc385c1-ca50-433b-b1d0-b91419ac6a1e
  details.runId=tool:image_generate:c242e170-2fd7-4e73-9338-b5f94de745b9
  details.model=xai/grok-imagine-image
custom message:
  customType=openclaw.sessions_yield_interrupt
  content=[sessions_yield interrupt]
warning scan:
  generic incomplete-turn warning NOT found
task ledger:
  taskId=7dc385c1-ca50-433b-b1d0-b91419ac6a1e
  taskKind=image_generation
  sourceId=image_generate:xai
  requesterSessionKey=agent:main:pr-85933-async-proof-final
  status=running
  progressSummary=Generated media; delivering completion
```

Observed result after fix: The async image generation turn recorded a started background task and yielded for completion; the generic incomplete-turn warning was not present in the transcript.

What was not tested: The same local CLI probe later exited with `SessionWriteLockTimeoutError: session file locked (timeout 60000ms)` after the async task started and the session yielded. I treated that as a separate local session-lock/completion-delivery issue and did not claim full completion delivery from this probe. The current post-push GitHub checks are still running on this SHA.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
